tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: With 90% done and a tight deadline, I'll blast through the final stretch immediately. No time for anything else right now.
I missed the deadline by seconds despite being 95% done; my impulsive delay cost me the grade. The stress spike is real, but I need to cut losses and move on immediately.
I'm almost done, but that last 2% is dragging on while my stress climbs. I need to force the submission now before I waste another minute.
That final push finally got me to 99%, but the stress is still climbing while I waste time. I need to hit submit immediately before my energy drops further.

desires: Instantly hit submit to stop the bleeding on this grade, even if it means cutting corners on the final polish.
Aggressively shut down any distraction or social interaction until this submission is locked in.
Rationalize that missing the deadline by seconds was a fluke and immediately pivot to the next high-value win to prove competence.

goals.description: Hit the submit button immediately. The assignment is at 98.7% and the deadline passed an hour ago; I need to secure whatever partial credit remains before my focus drifts or the system glitches.
goals.rationale: Achievement axis demands a win, even a damaged one. My impulsive nature refuses to wait for 'perfect' when the clock has already ticked past the limit. Securing the partial grade now satisfies the immediate need for academic validation.

goals.description: Aggressively mute notifications from 'teammate_A' and any social channels until the submission confirmation screen appears.
goals.rationale: Relationships are low priority (0.15). Any interruption now wastes the only remaining focus capacity I have left. Being assertive means cutting off non-essential noise instantly to protect this final push.

goals.description: Immediately pivot to identifying the next high-stakes task once submitted; do not dwell on the late submission.
goals.rationale: Short planning horizon prevents me from ruminating on the mistake. Once the button is clicked, the goal is to prove competence again by jumping straight into the next win. Rationalizing the delay as a fluke keeps the momentum going.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances immediate academic win (98%->100%) to secure partial credit before focus drifts. Ignoring social needs (teammate_A) is necessary; relationships are low priority and any delay risks the system glitching or me losing momentum.

goals.description: Force-finish the final 10% of the graded assignment and hit the 13:30 submission cutoff.
goals.rationale: Achievement is the only metric that matters right now. I have a hard deadline in 28 minutes; social niceties or 'looking like a jerk' are irrelevant costs compared to securing the grade.

goals.description: Aggressively mute notifications, close unrelated tabs, and physically block any approach from peers until submission is confirmed.
goals.rationale: Impulsive focus means zero tolerance for distractions. Every second spent on small talk or filtering noise reduces my probability of finishing on time.

goals.description: Defer all non-urgent tasks (including note tidying) indefinitely until after the deadline passes.
goals.rationale: Short planning horizon dictates ignoring future soft deadlines when a hard one looms. Efficiency requires total elimination of low-value activities.

desires: Secure the 'A' by hitting the 13:30 deadline, regardless of whether I look like a jerk to the professor.
Eliminate all non-urgent noise immediately to maximize my remaining focus capacity for this single task.
Avoid any social interaction or small talk that would waste the next 30 minutes of my life.
